steps.action: List docs/workflows and verify all required business workflow guides exist.
steps.expected: Guides exist for O2C, P2P, manufacturing/packaging, inventory, accounting/period close, payroll, admin/tenant, and data migration.
steps.observed: All 8 required files are present: sales-order-to-cash.md, purchase-to-pay.md, manufacturing-and-packaging.md, inventory-management.md, accounting-and-period-close.md, payroll.md, admin-and-tenant-management.md, data-migration.md.

steps.action: Read each workflow guide for business-user orientation and endpoint mapping.
steps.expected: Guides are step-by-step, user-facing (non-developer), and include API mappings and operational troubleshooting.
steps.observed: Each guide contains step table columns (what to do, screen+API mapping, expected outcome, what can go wrong) and aligns to accountant/warehouse/sales/HR audiences.

evidence.output: workflow_missing is empty and all required workflow files are present.

steps.action: Read docs/design/private-ledger.md and verify design-only contract requirements.
steps.expected: Document contains flag-vs-schema analysis, security model (RBAC+PIN+audit), query isolation, roadmap, and explicit not-implemented status.
steps.observed: Document explicitly states `Status: NOT IMPLEMENTED`, includes Option A/Option B analysis, recommended flag-based approach, RBAC+PIN+audit security flow, query isolation controls, and phased implementation roadmap.

evidence.output: private_ledger_checks flags are all true: not_implemented, option analysis, security model, query isolation, roadmap.

frictions.description: Task subagent spawn failed with model alias error (`Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro`).
frictions.resolution: Executed flow validation directly in-session and produced flow report artifact manually.

summary: Validated docs-workflows assertion group through workflow file inventory and content inspection; both assertions passed.
